name: Buffet Bean Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon mustard or Durkee Famous Sauce
1 can (16 oz.) French-style green beans, drained
1 can (15 1/2 oz.) yellow wax beans, drained
1 can (2.8 oz.) Durkee French Fried onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. In a medium skillet, fry bacon until crisp. Remove from the skillet and crumble it; set aside.
3. Drain all but about 2 tablespoons of drippings from the skillet. Add sugar, vinegar, salt, and mustard (or Durkee Famous Sauce). Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
4. In a large bowl, combine drained beans with half a can of onions and the hot sugar mixture.
5. Spoon the bean mixture into a 9x13 inch baking dish. Cover and bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes or until heated through.
6. Top with crumbled bacon and remaining onions; bake uncovered for an additional 5 minutes or until onions are golden brown.
7. Makes 12 to 14 servings.
